0.text: Bronchiectasis in the right lung's medial segment of the upper lobe and the anterior and posterobasal segments of the left lower lobe

1.text: Bronchial wall thickening in the right lung's medial segment of the upper lobe and the anterior and posterobasal segments of the left lower lobe

2.text: Peribronchial subcentimeter consolidations in the right lung's medial segment of the upper lobe and the anterior and posterobasal segments of the left lower lobe

3.text: Reticulonodular infiltrates with ground-glass opacities in the right lung's medial segment of the upper lobe and the anterior and posterobasal segments of the left lower lobe

4.text: Thickening of the major fissure in the upper parts of the left lung

5.text: Indeterminate subcentimeter nodules in bilateral lungs
